title: Video Factory Manifest
description: Declarative, human-reviewable source of truth for one video. The Director/Screenwriter agents SERIALIZE their creative work into this; it is reviewed by a human BEFORE any expensive generation call; then the Producer/Editor agents consume and UPDATE it in place as assets are produced. If output is wrong, fix the manifest, not the code.

intent.description: One sentence: who this is for and what it must achieve. Anchors every downstream judgment call.

format.description: Output aspect ratios to render. Each becomes its own MP4.

brand.description: Visual + sonic identity carried across every scene. Locks consistency (drift is the #1 slop signal).

lut.description: Path to a .cube LUT applied to all generated clips before scene-specific correction.

music_style.description: Default music brief if a scene omits its own.

tone.description: e.g. 'calm authoritative', 'high-energy'. Drives TTS delivery + pacing.

hook.description: The first 0-3s. 50-60% of drop-off happens here. MUST work muted (60%+ watch silent).

text.description: On-screen text that lands before the voiceover. Never a logo.

id.description: Stable unique id, e.g. 's1'. Asset filenames key off this.

tts_script.description: EXACT narration. Source of truth for TIMING — scene duration is derived from real audio length, never estimated.

duration_estimate_s.description: Planning estimate only; replaced by measured audio duration after TTS.

source.description: code = Remotion-animated (zero-key); image = generated still; clip = generative video; screen_rec = supplied recording; avatar = talking head.

visual_brief.description: SEMANTIC art direction, NOT a keyword. 'neurons firing across a dark synaptic gap', not 'brain'. The Editor scores the produced asset against this before committing it.

asset.description: Path to the produced/supplied asset (filled by the pipeline).

props.description: For source=code: props passed to the component.

shot.description: Encourages shot variety (>=3 types / 60s). Advisory to the generator.

continuity_refs.description: Frame/asset paths from prior scenes to seed this scene's generation — carries character/look forward.

captions.description: auto = word-level animated captions from real STT timestamps.

music_bed.description: Music brief for this scene, or 'continue' to hold the prior track. Chapter changes should change the track.

sfx.description: SFX briefs, e.g. 'soft whoosh on cut', 'impact hit on reveal'.

provider_assignments.description: Per-scene provider overrides. Omitted = skill defaults (providers/providers.json).

quality_gate.description: Hard gates checked before a scene is accepted. Failure triggers regeneration, not silent continuation.

min_semantic_score.description: Editor's score (0-1) of the asset vs visual_brief.

silence_max_ms.description: Max leading/trailing silence in the TTS audio (ffprobe).
